title: Evo Pekka Deck Breakdown | Clash Royale
description: Segment-authored breakdown of the Evo Pekka control deck, mapping narration to the exact gameplay moments to show.
thumbnail_prompt: Evo Pekka charging with electric aura, 'BREAKDOWN' banner, high-contrast red and gold, reaction face
long_script: Authored project: the segments array below drives the timeline verbatim.

segments.voice: Today we're testing the new Evo Pekka deck on ladder.
Notice what happens when the opponent overcommits their elixir.
Then we flip it into a counter-push and take the tower.
